meta.purpose: MCP Tool 入参契约清单，供 coin-mcp-cli / 外部 QC CLI 在启动或交互时生成参数模板、校验必填与枚举、展示 logic 摘要；不替代 MCP ListTools 的 JSON Schema（运行时以 mcphost 注册为准）。
meta.consumer: CLI 读取本文件后按 tool_name 定位条目，结合 fields/required/conditional_required 构造请求体；调用仍走 MCP HTTP（如 scripts/curl-*.sh）或 coin-mcp-cli 子命令。
meta.scope: 描述 Info MCP 工具入参（当前 36 个 spec 条目）：其中 31 个是 gate-cli info 已发布 baseline leaf，5 个 domain=placeholder 为 spec-only/未发布 CLI leaf；news-mcp-server、docs-mcp-server 工具不在此文件。
meta.maintenance: 本目录 specs/QC/ 默认 .gitignore，本地维护；新增/改 Tool 须同步：toolnames.go 注册 → 本 JSON 增改 tools[] → total_tools 与条目数一致 → 跑 go test 相关领域包。logic 字段写服务端真实路由（mcphost → 领域 Fetcher），便于 CLI 排错。

tool_entry_keys.tool_name: MCP 工具名，与 ToolName* 常量一致
tool_entry_keys.request_type: Go 请求 struct，便于 CLI 对照源码
tool_entry_keys.required: JSON 字段名；无 jsonschema required 时以 Go 校验为准
tool_entry_keys.conditional_required: 人类可读条件（如 platform_name or exchange_slug）；CLI 宜提示而非硬编码
tool_entry_keys.fields: 入参清单；type 为 JSON 类型；enum 为服务端会拒绝的闭集；enum_note/common_values 补充默认与别名
tool_entry_keys.logic: handler 路径与关键分支（索引、降级、错误码语义），不含完整出参结构

field_type_notes.string|string[]: sections 等字段 MCP 可传逗号分隔字符串或 JSON 数组，服务端 FlexibleSections 解析
field_type_notes.int|int64: 与 Go struct 一致；CLI 传 JSON number

meta.enum_note: 多数 Request struct 无 jsonschema enum；闭集来自各领域 validate*。空字符串通常表示服务端默认。
meta.items_enum_note: string[] 的 items_enum 表示元素级闭集（若服务端校验）。
meta.common_values_note: common_values 为常见示例，未知值可能仍被接受（如 ES 指标名、platform_type）。
meta.placeholder_note: domain=placeholder 的工具调用固定返回 errs.CodeNotImplemented；这些工具保留在 MCP spec 文档中供上游对齐，不属于 gate-cli info 的 31 个已发布 baseline leaf。
meta.response_note: 本文件主要描述入参与校验；出参字段见各 Tool 的 Go Response struct 或 docs/openapi/mcp-tool-curl.md。

fields.name: query_type
fields.enum_note: omit defaults to auto

fields.name: scope
fields.enum_note: omit defaults to basic

tools.logic: mcphost tools_coin -> coinSearcher.SearchCoins; validates query/query_type/scope, builds OpenSearch query by query_type, supports chain hint disambiguation for address/auto.

fields.name: asset_type
fields.enum_note: omit defaults to crypto

fields.name: sort_by
fields.enum_note: omit defaults to market_cap ordering

tools.logic: mcphost tools_coin -> coinSearcher.SearchCoinsByFilter; multi-condition asset list query.

fields.name: time_range
fields.enum_note: only for top_gainers|top_losers; must omit for other ranking_type

tools.logic: mcphost tools_coin -> coinSearcher.GetCoinRankings; validate ranking_type/time_range compatibility and listing_* only for new_listing.

fields.name: period
fields.enum_note: omit defaults to 24h; all disables time window filter

tools.logic: mcphost tools_trend -> trendFetcherSet.GetCoinTrend.

fields.name: indicators
fields.enum_note: non-empty list required; names are ES _source fields (see internal/cointrend/ads_es_fields.go), not validated to a fixed enum

tools.logic: mcphost tools_trend -> trendFetcherSet.GetIndicatorHistory.

fields.name: period
fields.enum_note: omit defaults to 3d when no start/end; all disables time filter

tools.logic: mcphost tools_trend -> cointrend.GetTechnicalAnalysis; internally parallel fetches 15m/1h/4h/1d via GetCoinTrend then aggregates signal.

fields.name: timeframe
fields.enum_note: merged with indicator_timeframe; both omit -> 1h

fields.name: indicator_timeframe
fields.enum_note: alias when timeframe empty

fields.name: source
fields.enum_note: futures accepted as alias of future; omit -> spot; normalized to alpha|spot|future|fx

fields.name: scope
fields.enum_note: omit -> basic

tools.logic: mcphost tools_snapshot -> snapshot.Service.GetSnapshot; scope detailed|full merges Coinglass derivatives when platformmetrics.coinglassCoinDerivatives index configured; if snapshot service nil returns snapshot_not_configured.

fields.name: timeframe
fields.enum_note: omit -> 1h

fields.name: source
fields.enum_note: futures alias of future; omit -> spot

fields.name: scope
fields.enum_note: omit -> basic

tools.logic: mcphost tools_snapshot -> snapshot.Service.BatchMarketSnapshot; validates symbols(max 20), timeframe/scope/source then msearch kline and enrich realtime/project_info.
mcphost tools_snapshot -> snapshot.Service.GetMarketOverview; if market_stats index configured use single-index path, else parallel aggregate CoinGecko + project info + BTC price.

fields.name: asset
fields.enum_note: case-insensitive after trim; omit -> BTC; all returns BTC and ETH groups; invalid -> invalid_param

fields.name: start_date
fields.enum_note: YYYY-MM-DD; omit -> end_date - 30d when end_date/latest exists; invalid date -> invalid_param

fields.name: end_date
fields.enum_note: YYYY-MM-DD; omit -> latest part_date from institutionalChannelIndex; invalid date -> invalid_param

fields.name: channel
fields.enum_note: case-insensitive after trim; omit -> all; channel-specific response nulls unrelated fields and recomputes point data_status; CME Daily Bulletin PDF is not a production source, so channel=cme returns cme_* fields null with cme_source_not_procured/cme_unavailable status

fields.name: limit
fields.enum_note: default 30; valid range 1..366; invalid -> invalid_param

tools.logic: mcphost tools_snapshot -> snapshot.Service.GetInstitutionalChannelMetrics; requires snapshot service plus OpenSearch endpoint/client and snapshot.institutionalChannelIndex else snapshot_not_configured. Normalizes asset BTC|ETH|all, channel all|etf|cme|cftc, dates as YYYY-MM-DD, rejects start_date>end_date. Fetches latest part_date when end_date omitted, then queries dwd_external_asset_etf_cme_cftc_df by asset/date sorted part_date desc with size=limit; source_fields intentionally exclude CME fields because CME Daily Bulletin free PDF is not a production data source. asset=all runs BTC and ETH separately; response echoes asset/channel/start_date/end_date, total=sum ES totals, count=sum returned series length, assets[].latest=first series point, data_status aggregates ok|partial|missing. ETF and CFTC weekly fields continue; cme_volume/cme_oi/cme_oi_change and CME underlying fields are forced null even if stale index values exist, and all/cme point status uses cme_source_not_procured or cme_unavailable rather than cme_parse_failed/cme_missing. Channel filters null unrelated ETF/CME/CFTC fields; empty latest index returns missing with assets=[].

fields.name: scope
fields.enum_note: detailed maps to full; unknown values normalize to basic

fields.name: upstream_raw_mode
fields.enum_note: case-insensitive; unknown -> off; include_upstream_raw=true forces full

tools.logic: mcphost tools_address -> addrService.GetAddressInfo; New Explorer first, BlockInfo fallback, optional multi-chain detect and scope-based extra sections.

fields.name: tx_type
fields.enum_note: omit -> all

fields.name: time_range
fields.enum_note: ignored when start_time or end_time set; 1d same window as 24h

fields.name: upstream_raw_mode
fields.enum_note: case-insensitive; unknown -> off; include_upstream_raw=true forces full

tools.logic: mcphost tools_address -> txService.GetTransactions; strategy chooses New Explorer and/or BlockInfo by chain and tx_type, merges records, applies time/value filters, then sorts and limits.

fields.name: upstream_raw_mode
fields.enum_note: case-insensitive; unknown -> off; include_upstream_raw=true forces full

tools.logic: mcphost tools_onchain -> onchain.GetTransaction; output transformed by getTransactionMCPOutputFrom with upstream raw mode.

fields.name: scope
fields.enum_note: unknown -> full

fields.name: upstream_raw_mode
fields.enum_note: case-insensitive; unknown -> off; include_upstream_raw=true forces full

tools.logic: mcphost tools_onchain -> onchain.GetTokenOnchain.

conditional_required: token xor address (one required, not both)

fields.name: scope
fields.enum_note: non-full treated like basic for extended sections

fields.name: lang
fields.enum_note: omit -> en

tools.logic: mcphost tools_compliance -> tokenSecuritySvc.CheckTokenSecurity; tool registered only when tokenSecurity service enabled.

fields.name: scope
fields.enum_note: omit or unknown -> basic; detailed maps to with_chain_breakdown

fields.name: include_oi_symbol_detail
fields.enum_note: scope=full only; true adds competition_metrics.oi_symbol_detail[] (OI USD desc) when CEX competition index configured; default false

fields.name: oi_symbol_limit
fields.enum_note: only when include_oi_symbol_detail=true; omit or <=0 uses default 20; values >100 return invalid_param

tools.logic: mcphost tools_platformmetrics -> fetcher.GetPlatformInfo; resolve platform by platform_id|platform_name (recent snapshot_time); scope=full enriches with platform_history (tvl|volume|fees), top_pools (yield limit 5), cexExchangeDerivativesVolume merge (derivatives + period_metrics), then mergeCexCompetitionIntoPlatformInfo when CEX index + CEX row; include_oi_symbol_detail gates oi_symbol_detail slice capped by oi_symbol_limit; applyPlatformInfoScope strips fields for basic|with_chain_breakdown; nil fetcher returns requires_open_search.

fields.name: platform_type
fields.enum_note: no closed enum validation; empty/all means no filter; unknown values pass through as platform_type term(s)

fields.name: sort_by
fields.enum_note: omit or other -> tvl sort field

fields.name: sort_order
fields.enum_note: omit or non-asc -> desc

tools.logic: mcphost tools_platformmetrics -> fetcher.SearchPlatforms; platform_type normalization: empty/all=no filter, dex|dexs|dexes -> DEX group, cex keeps CEX/cex variants, defi expands to grouped terms, unknown strings pass through to ES platform_type; sort_order normalized to asc|desc (default desc); nil fetcher returns requires_open_search.

fields.name: category
fields.enum_note: omit -> all; known values are case-insensitive; unknown strings are allowed and passed through as platform_type filter (no hard reject)

tools.logic: mcphost tools_platformmetrics -> fetcher.GetDefiOverview; optional cex_perps_volume_* from cexExchangeDerivativesVolume index, exchange_usdt_reserve_total from exchange_reserves USDT sum; nil fetcher returns requires_open_search.

fields.name: symbol
fields.enum_note: Basic DefiLlama items: any symbol or omit for ranked list; sections=issuance_flow whitelist USDT|USDC (omit defaults USDT+USDC); sections=usage_structure whitelist USDT|USDC|DAI|FDUSD|PYUSD (omit defaults all five); unsupported extension symbol -> unsupported_stablecoin_symbol

fields.name: chain
fields.enum_note: Basic: empty/all means no chain filter; single-chain filters by chain_circulating keys. Extension sections: all (default) or ethereum|omni|tron|solana|bsc|arbitrum|optimism|polygon|avalanche; aliases include eth/sol/bnb/arb/op/matic/avax; invalid extension chain -> invalid_chain

fields.name: limit
fields.enum_note: default 10 max 400; single row when symbol set

fields.name: scope
fields.enum_note: default basic; invalid scope -> invalid_param

fields.name: sections
fields.enum_note: Comma string or array; requires scope=full (else sections_requires_full_scope); can request one or both sections; unknown section -> invalid_sections

fields.name: start_date
fields.enum_note: UTC YYYY-MM-DD; only with scope=full and sections=issuance_flow or usage_structure else invalid_param; default last 30 calendar days inclusive

fields.name: end_date
fields.enum_note: UTC YYYY-MM-DD; issuance_flow caps future dates to today; usage_structure defaults to latest data date when omitted; window >366d truncates start with range_truncated=true

tools.logic: mcphost tools_platformmetrics -> fetcher.GetStablecoinInfo; validates scope basic|full and sections issuance_flow|usage_structure, rejects sections without scope=full and date params without extension sections. Base items query stablecoinInfo recent snapshots sorted by total_circulating desc; chain filter is applied in Go by parsing chain_circulating (list without chain returns chain_circulating=null, list with chain returns requested chain peggedUSD, detail without chain returns top5+_other_chains_*, detail with chain returns requested chain). scope=full+sections=issuance_flow queries stablecoinIssuanceFlow via ES by_asset terms + by_date date_histogram agg (empty agg -> hit scan fallback) and adds issuance_flows[] with summary/series/chain_breakdown when chain=all; issuance_flow index/query errors degrade to placeholder flow blocks with quality_note. scope=full+sections=usage_structure queries stablecoinRealUsage, resolves latest/default date window, and adds usage_structure{window_start,window_end,items[]} with adjusted_transfer_volume (entity_adjusted first, adjusted fallback), bot_share (derived from entity_adjusted/transfer_volume first, bot_share fallback), retail_transfer_change, stablecoin_trade_volume, reference fields, data_status, missing_fields, row_count; missing usage index or query errors degrade to placeholder usage items. range_truncated=true when any extension window is clipped; nil fetcher returns requires_open_search; missing stablecoinInfo index returns not_implemented.

fields.name: sort_by
fields.enum_note: omit -> volume_24h

tools.logic: mcphost tools_platformmetrics -> fetcher.GetBridgeMetrics; sort_by maps to ES field volume_24h|volume_7d|volume_30d|deposit_txs_24h (unknown -> volume_24h); limit default 10 max 400; bridge_name normalized lowercase; nil fetcher returns requires_open_search.

fields.name: market_type
fields.enum_note: case-insensitive; omit -> PERP; spot -> SPOT; unrecognized values are uppercased and passed through

fields.name: data_scope
fields.enum_note: omit: exchange when exchange is set and exchange index exists, else market if market index exists, else exchange; invalid value -> invalid_param; missing target index -> not_implemented

tools.logic: mcphost tools_platformmetrics -> fetcher.GetCexOrderbookDepth; symbol required; limit default 20 max 100; requires orderbookDepthExchange or orderbookDepthMarket index; nil fetcher returns requires_open_search.

fields.name: sort_by
fields.enum_note: only tvl_usd switches sort key; omit or any other value -> apy sort

tools.logic: mcphost tools_platformmetrics -> fetcher.GetYieldPools; nil fetcher returns requires_open_search.

conditional_required: platform_name or exchange_slug (at least one required)

fields.name: metrics
fields.enum_note: omit or empty -> [tvl]; no strict per-element validation in fetcher

fields.name: granularity
fields.enum_note: omit or unknown -> day; affects volume_perps field mapping in derivatives history index

tools.logic: mcphost tools_platformmetrics -> fetcher.GetPlatformHistory; requires platform_name or exchange_slug; defaults metrics=['tvl'] and granularity='day'; when metrics contains volume_perps switches to cexExchangeDerivativesVolume index and maps output field by granularity; nil fetcher returns requires_open_search.

fields.name: exchange
fields.enum_note: empty -> all-exchange rollup (mustBoolAllExchangeExchangeName); non-empty expands exchange name terms for ES match

fields.name: asset
fields.enum_note: empty = no asset filter; other values -> invalid_param

fields.name: scope
fields.enum_note: omit -> basic; full merges por from exchangeReservesPOR index when configured; invalid scope -> invalid_param

fields.name: include_history
fields.enum_note: default false; true only with scope=full else invalid_param; attaches precomputed PoR comparison fields, not raw snapshots

fields.name: history_window
fields.enum_note: only when include_history=true; omit defaults to quarter; other values -> invalid_param

tools.logic: mcphost tools_platformmetrics -> fetcher.GetExchangeReserves; searches exchangeReserves (no default snapshot_time range; latest via sort); scope=full and POR index set runs second query on POR index and enrichExchangeReservesItemsWithPOR; requires exchangeReserves index else not_implemented; nil fetcher returns requires_open_search.

fields.name: exchange
fields.enum_note: omit = all exchanges; non-empty expands alias terms on exchange.keyword

fields.name: range
fields.enum_note: optional price bucket filter, format min-max e.g. 40000-50000; parse fail = no range filter (not invalid_param)

tools.logic: mcphost tools_platformmetrics -> fetcher.GetLiquidationHeatmap; symbol required; queries liquidationHeatmap index with recent snapshot_time; nil fetcher returns requires_open_search.

fields.name: mode
fields.enum_note: anything other than timeseries normalizes to latest

tools.logic: mcphost tools_macro -> fetcher.GetMacroIndicator; fetcher nil returns requires_open_search.
mcphost tools_macro -> fetcher.GetEconomicCalendar; fetcher nil returns requires_open_search.
mcphost tools_macro -> fetcher.GetMacroSummary; zero-argument dashboard; fetcher nil returns requires_open_search.

fields.name: market_type
fields.enum_note: omit -> spot

tools.logic: mcphost tools_marketdetail -> marketdetail.Service.GetOrderbook; tool only registered when marketdetail service is non-nil.

fields.name: market_type
fields.enum_note: omit -> spot

tools.logic: mcphost tools_marketdetail -> marketdetail.Service.GetRecentTrades; tool only registered when marketdetail service is non-nil.

fields.name: market_type
fields.enum_note: omit -> spot

fields.name: timeframe
fields.enum_note: required non-empty; passed to Gate API interval; unparseable duration falls back to 1m internally

fields.name: limit
fields.enum_note: default 100 when no time range; capped by ToolMaxListSize

tools.logic: mcphost tools_marketdetail -> marketdetail.Service.GetKline; tool only registered when marketdetail service is non-nil.
mcphost tools_placeholder -> notImplemented returns errs.CodeNotImplemented.
mcphost tools_placeholder -> notImplemented returns errs.CodeNotImplemented.
mcphost tools_placeholder -> notImplemented returns errs.CodeNotImplemented.
mcphost tools_placeholder -> notImplemented returns errs.CodeNotImplemented.
